//1: ARSENAL: the ronutz.com application (private). This repo BECOMES the
//2: deployable site. As of 2026-06-29 it is SELF-CONTAINED: it no longer
//3: consumes @ronutz/netcore at runtime. The single-subnet CIDR logic that
//4: still did was brought in-house (cidrAnalyze). This reverses C-73's premise:
//5: netcore is now a future curation TARGET, not an upstream dependency.
name: @ronutz/arsenal
description: The ronutz.com application: a privacy-first, local-compute network/security toolbox PWA (Next.js).

scripts.//build-note: build runs next build THEN pagefind. Pagefind indexes the static HTML in out/ to produce the client-side search index. The two steps must run in order.
scripts.build: next build && pagefind --site out && tsx scripts/gen-machine-legible.mts
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/check-tool-articles.mjs && node scripts/check-changelog.mjs && node scripts/check-tools-registry.mjs && node scripts/copy-locales.mjs && tsx scripts/build-openapi.mts && node scripts/gen-locale-coverage.mjs && node scripts/gen-build-info.mjs

//7: No runtime dependency on @ronutz/netcore; modules curate OUT to it later.
//overrides: postcss pinned to >=8.5.10 to clear GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 (XSS in CSS stringify); build-time tooling only.
